name: SensorPush

customtypedparams.name: fetch_limit
customtypedparams.title: Fetch Limit
customtypedparams.desc: How many recent samples to request per sensor (default 1).

customtypedparams.name: sensor_offline_hours
customtypedparams.title: Sensor Offline Hours
customtypedparams.desc: Alert when no fresh sample is seen for this many hours (default 1).

customtypedparams.name: sensor_offline_notify_recovery
customtypedparams.title: Notify On Recovery
customtypedparams.desc: Send ntfy when an offline sensor starts reporting again (default 1).

customtypedparams.name: sensor_ntfy_ignore_list
customtypedparams.title: Sensor ntfy Ignore List
customtypedparams.desc: Comma-separated sensor names to ignore for ntfy online/offline alerts.

customtypedparams.name: ntfy_topic
customtypedparams.title: ntfy Topic
customtypedparams.desc: Optional: set to enable push notifications via ntfy.

customtypedparams.name: ntfy_token
customtypedparams.title: ntfy Access Token
customtypedparams.desc: Optional bearer token for private ntfy topics.

description: PG3 for SensorPush cloud API with configurable short/long poll update mode.
